heading: Preventing compliance with subchapter; liability of controlling persons
label: 80a–64 Preventing compliance with subchapter; liability of controlling persons
text: Notwithstanding the exemption set forth in , shall apply to a business development company to the same extent as if it were a registered closed-end investment company, except that the provisions of shall not be construed to require any company which is not an investment company within the meaning of to comply with the provisions of this subchapter which are applicable to a business development company solely because such company is a wholly-owned subsidiary of, or directly or indirectly controlled by, a business development company.section 80a–6(f) of this titlesection 80a–47 of this titlesection 80a–47(a) of this titlesection 80a–3(a) of this title
